name: QuickDrop
desc: A MERN-based grocery delivery app with real-time tracking, AI recipe suggestions, smart pantry management, and secure PayPal and Stripe payments.
problem: Grocery shopping and delivery often lack real-time visibility and smart planning. QuickDrop lets users order groceries, track delivery live, get AI-powered recipe ideas from what's in their pantry, and pay securely online.

features.text: Real-time order tracking from checkout to delivery
AI-powered recipe suggestions based on pantry items
Smart pantry management to reduce food waste

name: BookZone
desc: A MERN-powered library management system for handling books, users, and borrowing records with an efficient digital workflow.
problem: Manual library record-keeping is slow and error-prone. BookZone digitises the entire workflow, letting staff manage the book catalogue, members, and borrow/return records from one dashboard.

features.text: Full book catalogue with search & filters
Borrow & return workflow with due-date tracking
Role-based access for staff and members

name: EliteMart
desc: A modern e-commerce platform offering product browsing, secure shopping, great deals, and a smooth user experience.
problem: Small online stores need a fast, modern shopping experience without heavy overhead. EliteMart provides product browsing, cart management, and a smooth checkout flow with a clean, responsive UI.

name: ShortiFy
desc: A URL shortener built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB that generates compact links and redirects users seamlessly.
problem: Long, messy URLs are hard to share and track. ShortiFy generates short, unique links that redirect instantly, making links easier to share and manage.

features.text: Generate short links in one click

name: MyAuthApp
desc: A secure authentication system featuring registration, JWT sessions, email verification, and password reset support.
problem: Building secure auth from scratch is a common but error-prone requirement. MyAuthApp implements a complete, reusable authentication flow with verified sessions and safe password recovery.

name: PokeCards
desc: A React app that fetches Pokémon data from a public API, allowing users to search and explore detailed information.
problem: Pokémon fans want a quick, visual way to look up stats and details. PokeCards fetches live data from a public API and presents it in searchable, easy-to-browse cards.

features.text: Live data from a public REST API

name: MiniProjects
desc: A collection of interactive web tools including a translator, GitHub viewer, gradient generator, BMI, and currency converter.
problem: Small everyday utilities are often scattered across different sites. MiniProjects bundles several handy tools into one place, built purely with core JavaScript.

name: AG BookStore
desc: A JavaScript-based online bookstore with cart management, purchases, and account handling powered by LocalStorage.
problem: AG BookStore simulates a full online bookshop experience — browsing, cart management, and simple account handling — entirely on the client side using LocalStorage.

name: EveryDay Eats
desc: A recipe discovery app with step-by-step instructions, search functionality, and meals from cuisines around the world.
problem: Deciding what to cook can be time-consuming. EveryDay Eats lets users search global recipes and follow clear, step-by-step cooking instructions.

features.text: Search recipes by name or cuisine
Meals from cuisines around the world

name: Language Tranlator
desc: A multilingual translator with real-time translation, speech recognition, and text-to-speech powered by APIs.
problem: Communicating across languages needs more than plain text translation. This tool adds real-time translation with speech recognition and text-to-speech for a more natural experience.

name: FoodHub
desc: A modern restaurant management interface designed to deliver a smooth, responsive, and user-friendly experience.
problem: Restaurant-facing interfaces are often clunky. FoodHub focuses on a clean, responsive UI for browsing menus and managing orders with a smooth user experience.
